name: Field and Stream Stuffed Burgers
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix onion, relish, Worcestershire sauce, and any optional ingredients you wish to use together. Be sure to get the eggs mixed in completely.
2. Roll meat out and make 16 thin patties.
3. Spoon the pre-made mixture onto the top of one patty.
4. Place another patty on top.
5. Press firmly to join them.
6. Wipe up any mixture that runs out of the patty stack and spread over the top of the patty stack.
7. Either broil in your oven until they are as you prefer them or cook on a barbecue grill as you see fit.
